import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import timm
import torchvision.models as models

class EnsembleViT(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.clip = timm.create_model('vit_base_patch16_clip_224.openai', pretrained=True, num_classes=0)
        self.in21k = timm.create_model('vit_base_patch16_224.augreg_in21k_ft_in1k', pretrained=True, num_classes=0)
        self.rn18 = models.resnet18(weights=models.ResNet18_Weights.IMAGENET1K_V1)
        self.rn18.fc = nn.Identity()
        
    def forward(self, x_clip, x_in21k, x_rn18):
        f_clip = self.clip(x_clip)
        f_in21k = self.in21k(x_in21k)
        f_rn18 = self.rn18(x_rn18)
        return f_clip, f_in21k, f_rn18

def get_model():
    return EnsembleViT()
